id.description:
Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.

key.description: The secret. Handed back in full so it can be copied.

display.description: Masked secret, safe to show in a list.

role.description: The role the key acts with — it caps the key's permissions.

timeUsed.description: When the key last authenticated a request.

expiresAt.description: When the key stops working. Null means it never expires.

current.description: Whether this is the key authenticating the current request.

Key.description: An API key belonging to a user, scoped to a role in an organization.

Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.

Todo.description: A todo item that belongs to a user.

File.description: An uploaded file that belongs to a user.

Organization.description: An organization users belong to through members.

Member.description: A user's membership in an organization, carrying their role.

id.description:
Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.

owner.description: The seeded owner role — cannot be edited or removed.

Role.description: A role grouping permissions, assignable to members of an organization.

id.description:
Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.

Invitation.description: A pending invite to join an organization with a given role.

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.
List the current user's API keys. The key authenticating this request is flagged `current`.

post.description: Mint a named API key for the current user. Pass `expiresInDays` to set an expiry; omit it for a key that never expires. `roleID` scopes the key to a role in one of your orgs; without it the key takes your own role in the org named by `X-Org-ID`. The role's permissions must not exceed yours.

200.description: The created key, including its secret.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. The secret stops authenticating immediately.
